name: Thai Coconut Chicken Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Boneless chicken breasts, cut into bite size pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, add the chicken broth, coconut milk, and galangal. Bring to boil (350°F), stirring for 1 minute to ensure that the coconut milk and chicken broth are mixed well.
2. Add the chicken breasts and stir for 1 more minute.
3. Add in the remaining ingredients: white or brown sugar, fish sauce, lemon or lime juice, cilantro leaves, Thai chili paste, and button mushrooms. Stir for 1 more minute.
4. Remove the soup from the heat and pour into individual soup bowls.
5. Top with cilantro leaves. If desired, add sliced serrano peppers for extra spice.
